title: DESNZ: voluntary reporting on disability, mental health and wellbeing, 2025 to 2026
body: "The Voluntary Reporting Framework was launched by the government to encourage businesses to report how many of their staff have a disability or health condition, and also to report on the health and wellbeing of staff.  The framework was created in partnership with employers and charities. The Civil Service as a whole currently reports against the framework in full - this report provides progress in DESNZ for 2025 in accordance with the guidance for voluntary reporting.  "
